_comment: P36 AI-surface / packaging format monitors (new category ai-surface-spec). Load: python3 tools/source_currency.py seed-sources canonical-sources/ai-surface-spec-seed.json. These protect our exports from silently breaking: MCP transport deadlines, .dxt->.mcpb rename, SKILL.md field caps + reserved-word ban, GPT Actions char limits, Gemini model retirements. Prefer git releases/commits Atom feeds; ETag+sha256 or the plain-text changelog for the rest.
name: Model Context Protocol spec releases (GitHub)
extraction_hint: a new date-tag (e.g. 2025-11-25) is a new protocol revision; watch for transport deprecations (SSE->Streamable HTTP), JSON Schema dialect, auth changes

name: MCP Bundle (.mcpb) manifest spec (GitHub)
extraction_hint: the .dxt->.mcpb rename and manifest_version bumps (0.3/0.4); required manifest fields for a Desktop Extension bundle

name: Anthropic Agent Skills repo commits (GitHub)
extraction_hint: no releases; watch commits for skill-format changes; the repo has no tags

name: Agent Skills open specification (SKILL.md contract)
extraction_hint: SKILL.md frontmatter caps (name 64 / description 1024 / compatibility 500 chars), reserved-word ban on 'anthropic'/'claude', no consecutive hyphens; the field-constraint table is what breaks packaging

name: Claude Apps release notes (Projects/Desktop)
extraction_hint: consumer-surface changes to Projects knowledge limits, Memory, Desktop connectors; no RSS, ETag+sha256

name: OpenAI Apps SDK changelog (MCP in ChatGPT)
extraction_hint: the newer ChatGPT app packaging surface (built on MCP); _meta.ui contract, widget MIME, structuredContent

name: OpenAI GPT Actions production limits
extraction_hint: hard caps that silently truncate/reject exports: endpoint/param descriptions 300/700 chars, payloads <100k chars, 45s timeout, no custom headers

name: Google Gemini API changelog (plain text)
extraction_hint: plain-text mirror; cheapest reliable sha256 diff of any surface; tool/agent packaging changes

name: Google Gemini model deprecations
extraction_hint: model retirement dates; any pinned model id in an export fails after its shutdown date
